headline: Comcast Completes Network Expansion to More Than 5,200 Homes and Businesses in East Nottingham and Oxford Borough
summary: TREVOSE, Pa., March 30, 2026--Comcast has expanded its network to more than 5,200 homes and businesses across East Nottingham and Oxford Borough, bringing reliable, multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. The company recently completed construction in East Nottingham, and work in Oxford Borough is nearing completion. headline: Comcast Business Launches Total Solutions Advantage: Simplified, All-In Plans for Small Businesses Starting at $60 per Month
summary: PHILADELPHIA, March 30, 2026--Comcast Business, the nation’s largest provider of connectivity to small businesses, supported by the nation’s largest fiber-powered network, today announced Total Solutions Advantage – a new suite of simplified, all-in-one technology plans that combine high-speed connectivity and built-in cybersecurity into a predictable monthly price. headline: Uniti Fiber Names Heather Orrico to Lead Enterprise Sales
summary: Heather Orrico Heather Orrico, president of Enterprise Sales for Uniti Fiber. LITTLE ROCK, Ark., March 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Uniti Fiber, a provider of high-capacity fiber infrastructure, announced today that Heather Orrico has joined the company as president of Enterprise Sales. She will guide the enterprise sales approach and support growth efforts across the southeast region of the country. headline: Comcast Continues Expansion of Reliable, High-Speed Internet Across Merrimack County, New Hampshire
summary: MANCHESTER, N.H., March 30, 2026--More than 2,100 new homes and businesses in Northfield, New Hampshire now have access to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. Additionally, the company has connected more than half of the 4,300 homes and businesses in its Franklin, New Hampshire network expansion project to Xfinity and Comcast Business services, with construction scheduled to be completed by the end of the year.
